# Agentic CI/CD Copilot — Recommended Fix

Redirects pytest log output to a writable file by specifying --log-file=pytest.log in the pytest command.

## Commands to Apply

```bash
pytest --log-file=pytest.log
```

*Generated by [Agentic CI/CD Copilot](https://github.com/Atharv5873/Agentic-CI-CD-Copilot)*
